Off Calendar Aug-19-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Jonathan H. Bornstein, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Andrew Fernandez; Brian Leach, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Paulo Mafoa

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS MODIFIED: Plaintiff Andrew Fernandez's Motion For Order Compelling Defendant To Attend And To Testify At His Properly Noticed Deposition And For Terminating, Issue, Evidentiary, And Monetary Sanctions is granted as it seeks an order compelling Defendant to appear for his deposition to be noticed by Plaintiff and to be completed no later than OCTOBER 10, 2008. Defendant's failure to maintain contact cannot be used as a sword and a shield. All other sanctions are denied at this time. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR.
